layman_headline: Crypto market is in fear mode with no clear swing trade setups — staying on the sidelines.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is gripped by fear, with a Fear & Greed score of just 26 out of 100. Bitcoin dominance is high at 56.2%, which means money is flowing away from smaller coins (altcoins) and into Bitcoin for safety. None of the coins we're watching have a convincing combination of oversold technicals, strong chart patterns, and a news catalyst to justify jumping in right now. The best candidate, LayerZero (ZRO), has an RSI near oversold territory, but its chart is bearish and there's no clear catalyst to spark a reversal.
layman_action: Wait patiently. The market is fearful and altcoins are under pressure. Keep watching ZRO for a bounce off the $0.85-$0.90 support zone with volume confirmation before committing any capital.
expert_reasoning: ZRO's RSI of 31 is approaching genuine oversold territory, which historically has been a reliable signal (75% win rate in our track record). However, the chart bias score is -0.70 (bearish), price is below all major moving averages, and the 5-day momentum is -7.5% with no reversal candle pattern visible. BTC dominance at 56.2% continues to squeeze altcoin valuations, and the Fear & Greed index at 26 — while improving from last week's 24 average — hasn't reached the extreme fear levels (sub-20) that typically mark reliable bottoming signals. HTX has the best chart bias (+1.10) but is an illiquid micro-cap DAO token with RSI already at 58 and negligible volume, making it unsuitable for a swing trade. Without a volume breakout or news catalyst — both of which are our highest-conviction signal types — entering any position here carries unfavorable odds.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.2% and rising continues to drain capital from altcoins — any new alt position swims against this tide
No volume breakout signals across any candidates — our most reliable technical signal (100% win rate) is absent
Geopolitical uncertainty (U.S.-Iran strikes mentioned in news) could trigger sudden risk-off moves across all crypto
watch_list: ZRO RSI dropping below 30 with a bullish reversal candle (hammer/morning star) at $0.85 support
BTC dominance — any decline below 55% would signal rotation back into alts and improve the setup for all candidates
Fear & Greed index — a drop to extreme fear (sub-15) or a sharp reversal above 35 would clarify market direction
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear state (26/100) with BTC holding steady near $64K while altcoins bleed. High BTC dominance at 56.2% signals a risk-off environment unfavorable for altcoin swing trades.
context_banner: Fear-driven market with high BTC dominance — no high-conviction altcoin entry exists until a volume breakout or catalyst emerges.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 (Fear) and improving from weekly avg of 24, but not yet at extreme levels that historically mark reliable bottoms.
ZRO RSI at 31 is the only near-oversold reading among candidates, but lacks confirmation from chart structure or volume.
Bitcoin nearing Fidelity's power law support line tracked since 2015 suggests BTC may hold current levels, but no altcoin-specific catalyst found.
No volume breakout detected across any candidate — our highest-reliability signal (100% win rate, +13.4% avg return) is completely absent this cycle.
ETH derivatives reset noted by Blockworks suggests positioning is clearing, but ETH itself only moved +2.3% on 7d — no momentum yet.
